nasb.text: The people of the land shall also worship at the doorway of that gate before the Lord on the sabbaths and on the new moons.

esv.text: The people of the land shall bow down at the entrance of that gate before the Lord on the Sabbaths and on the new moons.

cnv.text: 每逢安息日和月朔，國中的人民要在這門口，在耶和華面前敬拜。

ccb.text: 在安息日和朔日，以色列人要站在这门口敬拜耶和华。
